The '''New Republic Advisory Council''' was a body that advised the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was comprised of [[Senator/Legends|senators]] from the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. The Advisory Council was formed at some point in between the signing of the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|Bastion Accords]] and the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], and sat in an elevated dais before the New Republic Senate.

==Overview==
The Advisory Council contained the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] and the senators from the most politically important [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] of the New Republic. Although there was apparently no set criteria or static roster, it was believed that [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], and [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] would always have a seat due to their worlds' strong contributions to the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], and [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] would always have a seat due to the large public support of the survivors of its destruction.

Under the presidency of [[Borsk Fey'lya]], the Council originally included six Senators, but during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], two positions were added for [[Kuat/Legends|Kuati]] Senator [[Viqi Shesh]] and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] Senator [[Narik]] (controversial actions, as Shesh's appointment was believed to be a concession to the Kuati).

Members of the Advisory Council from [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]:

*[[Fyor Rodan]]—[[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]
*[[Cal Omas]]—[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]
*[[Chelch Dravvad]]—[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*[[Niuk Niuv]]—[[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]
*[[Narik]]—[[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]
*[[Pwoe]]—[[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]
*[[Triebakk]]—[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*[[Viqi Shesh]]—[[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]

The Advisory Council dissolved upon the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquest]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the Yuuzhan Vong and the suicide-sacrifice of Borsk Fey'lya. It was reconstituted by [[Cal Omas]], and retained many executive privileges as the [[Galactic Alliance Advisory Council]], but it shared that role with the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]] formed by President Omas.
